pi_items.source: Verified through setup_task.sh and verifier.py which explicitly loop over and require these exactly 4 tasks.

The setup_task.sh script attempts to download sample data from PEBL GitHub URLs that do not exist (404 Not Found). It then falls back to local assets, using bart_data_real.csv (which matches sub-10159 from OpenNeuro ds000030) for BART, and completely synthetic 3-line mock data for flanker, simon, and wcst since their asset files are missing.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the required tasks are exactly bart, flanker, simon, and wcst. The claim that the data source is 'Real PEBL GitHub Sample Data' is contradicted; the PEBL GitHub URLs result in 404 errors as no such sample data exists. Consequently, the script relies on fallbacks, utilizing 'bart_data_real.csv' (which originates from participant sub-10159 in OpenNeuro ds000030) for BART, and fully synthetic 3-line mock data for flanker, simon, and wcst.
